## Validation

- [ ] `bun run check`
- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] `bun run pack:dry-run`

## Security checklist

- [ ] The change doesn't add install-time scripts or unexpected network access.
- [ ] The change doesn't log secrets, tokens, environment values, or raw local state.
- [ ] The change keeps filesystem writes scoped to documented paths.
- [ ] GitHub Actions permissions remain least-privilege.
